pluses: Star-sight — the Eldar see through the dark of night
Elven-swift — fleet and graceful of foot
Deft and quick — strikes faster than mortal eye can follow
Silent in the wild — moves unheard and unseen; foes notice the Firstborn late
Light-footed — the ground scarce bruises the Firstborn
Hard and resistant to hurt — hale of body (11 hearts)
Tall and far-reaching — strikes and works from a little farther (base Elf), and treads soft ground unhindered
Unwearied — needs no sleep and little food
Starlit Grace — heals (Regeneration) and quickens (+15% move speed, stacking) beneath the open night sky
Never sickens — immune to hunger's gnaw and to nausea; cold and powder-snow cannot freeze the Firstborn (base Elf + Kindred)
Unstained by the Shadow — curses and poisons wear off swiftly
minuses: Unease in the deep dark — creatures of light, the Firstborn are unsettled and weakened in lightless underground places (where a Dwarf is most at home)
